title: MineNation
description:
A Collection of Mods for a casual and aesthetic Minecraft Experience with scope to expand into other experiences.

featuring, Ars Nouveu, an expansive Create suite, MineColonies, Railcraft Reloaded and more

Ignore Alphas!


Server Currently Offline
body:
Just an assortment of mods compiled to scratch an itch

This collection of mods is geared towards passive and aesthetic interactions rather than the usual slog to beat the bosses as fast as possible

this pack is currently undergoing periodic review and is the primary focus while I wait for the majority of mods to convert to Neo-forge or newer minecraft versions

featuring; Ars Nouveu, an expansive Create suite, MineColonies, Railcraft Reloaded and various world gen features

Included is a link to a maintained server - server packs available on request

Ignore Alpha Versions - These will be missing Content and support - These are used to track progress towards newer versions of Minecraft

Reach out on Discord @DanDeLion1608
